---
title: "About"
toc: false
date: ""
sidebar: false
team:
  organizers:
    - name: "Agata Smialowska"
      image: "assets/images/profile/profile.webp"
      description: |
        Bioinformatician  
        NBIS / Stockholm University
    - name: "Dania Machlab"
      image: "assets/images/profile/profile.webp"
      description: |
        Bioinformatician  
        NBIS / Stockholm University
    - name: "Louella Vasquez"
      image: "assets/images/profile/profile.webp"
      description: |
        Bioinformatician  
        NBIS / Lund University
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
    anchor-sections: false
---

## Venue

<!-- update map markers in _metadata.yml -->
{{< leaflet stockholm >}}

<!-- additional practical information -->
{{< include assets/locations/_stockholm.qmd >}}

## Organizers

<!-- organizers info up in the yaml matter -->
{{< team organizers >}}

## Contact

This event is organized by [NBIS](https://nbis.se/) in co-operation with National Genomics Infrastructure ([NGI](https://ngisweden.scilifelab.se/)). NBIS and NGI are platforms at the Science for Life Laboratory (SciLifeLab). NBIS is the Swedish node of [Elixir](https://elixir-europe.org/).

For queries, write to us at **edu.epigenomics[at]nbis.se**.  

---

[[Epigenomics Data Analysis: From Bulk to Single Cell](https://nbisweden.github.io/workshop-epigenomics), a workshop created by [NBIS](https://nbis.se/) is licensed under [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)]{.small}.

![](assets/logos/nbis-scilifelab-ngi.svg){height="26px"}
